steps.action: POST /api/v1/runs with report_id=g2-dedupe-001, created_at=2024-01-15T11:00:00Z, schema_version=1.0.0 (first time)
POST /api/v1/runs with identical payload (same report_id, created_at, schema_version)
steps.expected: 200 OK with the SAME run_id (dedupe hit)

steps.action: GET /api/v1/runs/117ef4c0757b4d58b5f582aeacee7a6f to verify single run stored
steps.expected: 200 OK with stored run data matching submitted payload
steps.observed: 200 OK, report_id=g2-dedupe-001, dedupe_key present (redacted), single run confirmed

steps.action: Wait for clean rate limit window (20s), then send 4 rapid POST /api/v1/runs requests with test-key-2
steps.observed: Requests 1-3 returned 201 Created, request 4 returned 429 Too Many Requests

steps.expected: 429 response includes Retry-After header with retry guidance
steps.observed: 429 response included 'retry-after: 23' header and body {"detail":"Rate limit exceeded. Please retry later."}

steps.action: Wait for rate limit window to expire (25s), then send another POST request
steps.expected: Request succeeds with 2xx after window expiry
steps.observed: Request returned 201 Created, confirming rate limit window reset

evidence.network: POST /api/v1/runs -> 201 (x3), POST /api/v1/runs -> 429 (with retry-after: 23), POST /api/v1/runs -> 201 (after window expiry)

frictions.description: Initial rate limit test had stale window state from prior dedupe test requests. First attempt showed 429 on 3rd request instead of 4th because the rate limit window from VAL-API-006 testing had not fully expired.
frictions.resolution: Waited 20 seconds for clean window before re-running the rate limit burst test, which then correctly showed 3 successes and 4th as 429.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: all 3 passed. VAL-API-006 confirmed idempotent dedupe (same run_id on duplicate POST, 201->200 status transition). VAL-API-009 confirmed revoked-key-1 is rejected with 401 on all 3 authenticated endpoints. VAL-API-010 confirmed per-key rate limiting at 3 req/10s with 429 + Retry-After header and successful recovery after window expiry.
